title: A day at the market
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: Last Saturday, my aunt took me to a large outdoor market in the city centre. We arrived early because she wanted to avoid the crowds that usually appear later (27) the morning. There were hundreds of stalls selling fruit, clothes, books and handmade gifts. I was amazed (28) how many different things people could buy there. One man was painting pictures while another played music nearby. My aunt bought some fresh vegetables, and I chose a small notebook covered (29) colourful designs. After walking around for nearly two hours, we stopped at a café to rest. The market was busier (30) I had expected, but it was also much more interesting. Before leaving, my aunt reminded me not to spend all my money (31) unnecessary things. I think places like this are perfect (32) finding unusual presents.
